name: Bres Extended
description: Bres, also known as Eochaid Bres, is a complex figure in Irish mythology, primarily associated with the Tuatha Dé Danann. His parentage is unusual; his father was Elatha, a Fomorian king, and his mother was Ériu, a member of the Tuatha Dé Danann. This dual heritage placed him in a position of power but also created inherent conflict. Bres became king of the Tuatha Dé Danann, but his reign was marked by tyranny and poor leadership. He prioritized the needs of the Fomorians over his own people, imposing heavy taxes and neglecting their welfare. His lack of hospitality and stinginess further alienated him. Ultimately, his incompetence led to his overthrow by Nuada, who had been temporarily incapacitated. Bres fled to his father's land for aid, seeking to reclaim his throne. He attempted to regain power through force, culminating in the Second Battle of Mag Tuired, where he fought against the Tuatha Dé Danann. Despite his efforts, he was defeated and spared only after revealing the secret of when to plow, sow, and reap to the Tuatha Dé Danann. Bres embodies themes of misrule, the dangers of divided loyalties, and the importance of just leadership. He possesses no explicitly stated divine powers beyond those associated with kingship and the knowledge of agriculture, although his Fomorian heritage likely imbued him with inherent magical abilities. His story serves as a cautionary tale about the consequences of prioritizing personal gain over the well-being of the community.
subtitle: The Unjust King of the Tuatha Dé

keyMyths.title: Bres's Reign
keyMyths.description: Bres became king but ruled poorly, favoring the Fomorians and oppressing the Tuatha Dé Danann with heavy taxes and a lack of hospitality.
keyMyths.source: The Second Battle of Mag Tuired

keyMyths.title: Bres's Overthrow
keyMyths.description: Due to his tyrannical rule and incompetence, Bres was overthrown by Nuada and forced to flee to his Fomorian father for aid.
keyMyths.source: The Second Battle of Mag Tuired

keyMyths.title: The Second Battle of Mag Tuired
keyMyths.description: Bres returned with a Fomorian army to reclaim his throne, leading to a major battle where he was ultimately defeated and forced to reveal an agricultural secret.
keyMyths.source: The Second Battle of Mag Tuired

sources.author: Jeffrey Gantz
sources.description: A modern translation and compilation of early Irish texts.
sources.text: A modern translation and compilation of early Irish texts.
